name: Ria Money Transfer
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance service enabling fast money transfers to over 190 countries through multiple channels including online, mobile app, and in-person locations.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is an established international money transfer company with 35+ years of operating experience. The company facilitates remittances and cross-border payments for individuals sending money to family and friends worldwide. According to their website, Ria has processed over one billion transfers and maintains a network of more than 600,000 payout locations across 190+ countries and territories.

Ria offers multiple ways to send money: online via their website, through their mobile app (iOS/Android), in person at physical locations, and via WhatsApp messaging. Recipients can receive funds through bank deposits, cash pickup at partner locations, digital wallets, home delivery, and ATM withdrawals. The service supports over 100 currencies and provides real-time transfer tracking. They highlight competitive exchange rates and low transfer fees, with an example showing a $1.99 fee for USD-to-MXN transfers.

Key distinguishing features include their extensive agent network (600,000+ locations), multi-channel sending options (including WhatsApp integration), and long operational history suggesting regulatory compliance and stability. The company reports high customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 stars on iOS with 245.7k reviews, 4.8 stars on Google Play with 229.8k reviews, 4.5 stars on Trustpilot with 34.6k reviews) and offers a 100% satisfaction guarantee. Their mobile app enables faster repeat transfers and location discovery.

As a remittance-focused service, Ria primarily serves individuals sending money internationally rather than those seeking credit products or financial services. The service is straightforward but comes with standard international transfer fees and exchange rate markups. While their network and speed are competitive strengths, customers should compare rates across providers as margins vary by corridor and payment method.
pros: Massive global network with 600,000+ payout locations in 190+ countries enabling widespread cash pickup and delivery options
Multiple sending channels including online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp for convenient access
Fast transfer speeds with ability to send money in seconds and track transfers in real-time
Over 35 years of operational history and 1+ billion transfers processed demonstrating stability and regulatory compliance
Supports 100+ currencies with competitive exchange rates compared to traditional banks
Low transparent fees (example: $1.99 USD for Mexico transfers) with no hidden charges displayed
High customer satisfaction ratings (4.9/5 on iOS, 4.8/5 on Google Play, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot) with 500K+ combined reviews
cons: Transfer fees and exchange rate markups reduce the amount recipients receive compared to sending raw currency
Service is remittance-focused; does not offer credit products, savings accounts, or other financial services
Requires registration and login process adding friction for one-time users versus completely anonymous cash services
Limited to 190 countries; some smaller nations and territories may not be supported for certain receiving methods
Cash pickup and home delivery speeds depend on partner location availability and local banking infrastructure
best_for: Immigrants and expatriates regularly sending money to family in multiple countries across Africa, Asia, Europe, and Latin America
Individuals seeking convenient cash pickup options without requiring recipients to have bank accounts
Users who prefer mobile app functionality for frequent transfers and want to track payments in real-time
People sending remittances to Mexico and other high-volume corridors where Ria offers competitive rates and extensive agent networks
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for individuals regularly sending money internationally who value convenience, speed, and extensive payout options over rock-bottom rates. The main caveat is that like all remittance services, exchange rate markups and fees reduce the final amount received, so comparison shopping across providers (especially for large amounts) is advisable.
services: Online money transfer via website with real-time rate quotes
Mobile app-based money transfers for iOS and Android devices
In-person cash payment at physical agent locations
WhatsApp-based money transfer integration for select countries
Cash pickup at 600,000+ partner locations worldwide
Bank deposit direct transfer to recipient accounts
Digital wallet funding for supported e-money platforms
Home delivery of transferred funds in select locations
Real-time transfer tracking and status updates
Currency converter tool for rate comparison
IBAN calculator for international bank transfers
